title: Cars
meaning_summary: Its cold synth hook and instantly recognizable structure help it remain commercially durable across streaming and sync-heavy contexts.
revenue_drivers: Electronic and nostalgia playlists support steady repeat listening.
Sync use and cultural familiarity keep the track active beyond baseline streams.
The song's foundational synth-pop identity supports ongoing rediscovery.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Cars is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
